name: footer
title: Footer
description: Site footer landmark with heading-titled link columns, an agency/contact strip, and an automatically current copyright line designed to follow an optional Identifier. Columns reflow at narrow widths and 400% zoom.
useWhen: The last content region on every page of a government site
Grouping secondary navigation (departments, services, policies) into labelled columns
Showing the agency line with phone and email contact links
Pairing with the identifier component inside Footer, before FooterCopyright
Keeping a copyright year current without rebuilding or reloading the page
avoidWhen: The identity band with policy and support links (Accessibility, Public records, Privacy) — that is the identifier component
Primary page navigation (use a header navigation instead)
More than one per page (a page has a single contentinfo landmark)

keyboard: Tab moves focus through footer links in document order; Shift+Tab reverses
Enter activates a link (native anchor behavior — no custom key handling)
The footer adds no focus traps and no composite-widget arrow-key behavior
accessibility.targetSize: 44px project default (footer links render as min-h-11 targets)
